title: astragalus nobilis
intro: Astragalus nobilis, also known as Huang Qi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus nobilis include reducing fatigue and improving immune function, as well as providing protection against oxidative stress and inflammation. Astragalus nobilis can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
